channels.name: welcome
channels.initialMessage:
🎉 **Welcome to the Coding Community!**

This is a space for developers of all skill levels to:
• Learn new technologies
• Share projects and ideas
• Collaborate on code
• Help each other grow

Feel free to introduce yourself in #introductions and jump into the conversation!

channels.name: announcements
channels.initialMessage:
📢 **Announcements Channel**

This channel is for important server updates, event announcements, and community news. Make sure to enable notifications for this channel!

channels.name: general
channels.initialMessage:
💬 **General Chat**

Feel free to discuss anything here! Share memes, ask questions, and connect with other community members. Just keep it respectful! 😊

channels.name: introductions
channels.initialMessage:
👋 **Introductions**

Tell us about yourself! Share:
• Your name and experience level
• Programming languages you know
• What you're interested in learning
• Fun facts about yourself!

Welcome aboard! 🚀

channels.name: javascript
channels.initialMessage:
🟨 **JavaScript Channel**

Discuss JavaScript, Node.js, Express, and web development frameworks. Share your projects, ask questions, and learn from others!

Popular Topics:
• Frontend: React, Vue, Svelte
• Backend: Node.js, Express
• Tools: Webpack, Babel, ESLint

channels.name: python
channels.initialMessage:
🐍 **Python Channel**

Everything Python! From web development to data science.

Topics:
• Django & Flask
• Data Science: NumPy, Pandas, Scikit-learn
• Machine Learning & AI
• Automation & Scripting

channels.name: web-development
channels.topic: React, Vue, Angular, and frontend frameworks
channels.initialMessage:
🎨 **Web Development Channel**

Frontend frameworks and modern web development.

Covered:
• React, Vue, Angular, Svelte
• CSS & Styling
• Responsive Design
• Web Performance

channels.name: projects
channels.initialMessage:
🚀 **Projects Channel**

Showcase your projects, find collaborators, and discuss ideas!

Feel free to share:
• GitHub repos
• Project ideas
• Looking for teammates
• Code reviews & feedback

channels.name: resources
channels.initialMessage:
📚 **Learning Resources**

Curated learning materials and documentation:

**Recommended Sites:**
• MDN Web Docs: https://developer.mozilla.org
• Python Docs: https://docs.python.org
• Dev.to: https://dev.to
• FreeCodeCamp: https://freecodecamp.org

Share helpful resources here! 📖

channels.name: events
channels.initialMessage:
🎯 **Community Events**

Join us for:
• Weekly coding sessions
• Monthly hackathons
• Expert talks & workshops
• Pair programming sessions

Stay tuned for upcoming announcements! 📅
